meeting_script.name: Priya Sharma
meeting_script.message: We have a new requirement from the support team. Vikram can you explain what you need?

meeting_script.name: Vikram Nair
meeting_script.message: Sure. Right now support tickets come in and someone manually decides which team handles it. We want to automate that routing.

meeting_script.name: Rahul Mehta
meeting_script.message: We have three teams that handle tickets — billing, technical support, and general enquiries.

meeting_script.name: Vikram Nair
meeting_script.message: Priority also matters. Enterprise customers always get high priority. Everyone else gets normal priority.

meeting_script.name: Ananya Singh
meeting_script.message: From the client side — billing tickets are ones mentioning payment or invoice. Technical ones mention error or not working. Everything else is general.

meeting_script.name: Priya Sharma
meeting_script.message: Your job is to break this down into precise sub-tasks before we start building anything. Head to your desk.
